name: Scale AI
what_it_does: Enterprise data labeling and RLHF (Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback) API that enables agents to submit tasks for human annotation — covering image, text, video, audio, and LLM output evaluation — to generate high-quality training and evaluation datasets.
use_cases: Submitting batches of LLM-generated responses to Scale's human annotators for RLHF preference ranking and quality scoring
Creating image annotation tasks (bounding boxes, segmentation, classification) to build computer vision training datasets
Queuing document or text classification tasks for human review when model confidence is low
Retrieving completed annotation results via webhook or polling to feed downstream training pipelines
Evaluating model outputs at scale using Scale's Evaluation API to benchmark multiple model versions
not_for: Real-time or low-latency annotation requirements — Scale tasks have turnaround times of hours to days, not seconds
Small-scale labeling needs (under ~500 items) where direct annotation tools like Label Studio are more cost-effective
Teams without budget for enterprise-grade annotation — Scale pricing is enterprise-tier and not suitable for startups or indie projects
best_when: You are training or fine-tuning foundation models and need high-quality, consistent human annotations at scale — particularly for RLHF, safety evaluation, or building gold-standard eval datasets.
avoid_when: You need immediate annotation results, have a small dataset, or are working on a budget — the Scale API is designed for enterprise training data workflows with significant per-task costs.

auth.notes: Live and Test API keys provided at signup. Live keys submit real tasks (billed); Test keys submit to a sandbox with simulated completions. Keys are set via Authorization header as Bearer tokens.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; Test API key available for sandbox testing without charge
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-task pricing negotiated with Scale sales; highly variable by task type and complexity. Enterprise contracts with volume discounts.
pricing.notes: Scale is enterprise-priced — expect $0.10 to several dollars per annotated item depending on task complexity. RLHF and LLM evaluation tasks are at the higher end. Budget carefully for large annotation runs.

performance.rate_limits: API submission rate limits apply per account; task completion latency is hours to days (human-in-the-loop), not milliseconds

requirements.min_contract: enterprise sales process required for production access

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API returns descriptive JSON error objects. Test API provides useful sandbox feedback. Webhook delivery failures are logged in the dashboard.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Task creation is not idempotent — resubmitting the same unique_id will be rejected if a task with that ID already exists, which can be used as a deduplication mechanism.
known_agent_gotchas: Task completion is asynchronous (hours to days) — agents must implement webhook receivers or polling loops rather than awaiting synchronously
Live API key submits real tasks that are billed immediately — always test with Test API key before switching to Live
unique_id field is critical for preventing duplicate task submission — agents must generate stable, deterministic IDs per task
Webhook signature verification is required in production — unauthenticated webhook endpoints are a security risk
Scale's taxonomy and label schemas must be configured in the Scale dashboard before task submission — agents cannot define schemas via API at runtime

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Test/Live key separation prevents accidental billing in development. SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001 certified. HIPAA compliance available on enterprise plans. Data residency is US-only.
